title: Introduction to Integration Testing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the basics of integration testing.

questions.question: What is the primary role of integration testing in software development?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
To test different units of source code—such as functions or classes—together to see if they work correctly in tandem

questions.question: Regarding integration testing, why is it beneficial to catch bugs that occur during component interaction?
options: It ensures that different parts of your software work together as intended
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
